- @brief Generic container with RAII semantics.
@tparam T Element type; must satisfy Printable concept.
- @brief Stored value of type T.
```
template <Printable T> class Container {
public:
T value;
explicit Container(T v) : value(std::move(v)) {}
Container(const Container &other) = default;
Container(Container &&other) noexcept = default;
Container &operator=(const Container &other) = default;
Container &operator=(Container &&other) noexcept = default;
~Container() = default;
friend std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Container &c) {
return os << c.value;
}
bool operator==(const Container &other) const { return value == other.value; }
};
```

> Signature: `public class Person : IComparable<Person>, IDisposable`

```
public class Person : IComparable<Person>, IDisposable {
public const int MAX_AGE = 150;
private static int _instanceCount = 0;
private string _name;
public string Name {
get => _name;
set {
if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
throw new ArgumentException("Name cannot be empty");
_name = value;
}
}
public int Age { get; init; }
public string? Email { get; set; }
public Guid Id { get; } = Guid.NewGuid();
public event DataChangedHandler? OnDataChanged;
public Person(string name, int age) {
_name = name;
Age = age;
Interlocked.Increment(ref _instanceCount);
}
public void Greet() {
OnDataChanged?.Invoke(this, $"Greeted {Name}");
Console.WriteLine($"Hello, {Name}!");
}
public static async Task<string> FetchAsync(CancellationToken token = default) {
await Task.Delay(100, token);
return "data";
}
public int CompareTo(Person? other) {
if (other is null) return 1;
return Age.CompareTo(other.Age);
}
public void Dispose() {
Interlocked.Decrement(ref _instanceCount);
GC.SuppressFinalize(this);
}
public object? this[string propertyName] {
get {
return propertyName switch {
"Name" => Name,
"Age" => Age,
"Email" => Email,
_ => null,
};
}
}
public void Deconstruct(out string name, out int age) {
name = Name;
age = Age;
}
public static int GetInstanceCount() => _instanceCount;
}
```

- @param items Slice of strings to process.
- @param workers Number of concurrent worker goroutines.
- @return Channel delivering processed results.
```
func FanOut(items []string, workers int) <-chan string {
results := make(chan string, len(items))
var wg sync.WaitGroup
for i := 0; i < workers; i++ {
wg.Add(1)
go func(id int) {
defer wg.Done()
for _, item := range items {
results <- fmt.Sprintf("[%d] %s", id, item)
}
}(i)
}
go func() {
wg.Wait()
close(results)
}()
return results
}
```

```
class GenericContainer(Generic[T]):
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self._items: List[T] = []
    def add(self, item: T) -> None:
        self._items.append(item)
    def __iter__(self) -> Iterator[T]:

    def find(self, predicate) -> Optional[T]:
        for item in self._items:
            if predicate(item):

        return None

def with_retry(attempts: MAX_RETRIES)
tries = 0
begin
tries += 1
yield
rescue StandardError => e
retry if tries < attempts
raise "Failed after #{attempts} attempts: #{e.message}"
ensure
puts "Completed after #{tries} attempt(s)"
end
end
```

}
